FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.30sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f9e5cc03270>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-06-01T22:34:40Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-01T22:32:56Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-06-01T22:34:40Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-01T22:32:56Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/06/01 22:36:10.305806869 if (!missing(encoding))

2026/06/01 22:36:10.306002957 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)

2026/06/01 22:36:10.306077422 "default"))
2026/06/01 22:36:10.306097651 old$encoding <- enc

2026/06/01 22:36:10.306114792 }

2026/06/01 22:36:10.306146699 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/06/01 22:36:10.306163143 }
2026/06/01 22:36:10.306177173 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/06/01 22:36:10.306177955 }
2026/06/01 22:36:10.306191064 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/01 22:36:10.306191915 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]

2026/06/01 22:36:10.306224263 domain = NA)
2026/06/01 22:36:10.306225054 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/06/01 22:36:10.306241318 }
2026/06/01 22:36:10.306242159 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/06/01 22:36:10.306256550 old$family <- family
2026/06/01 22:36:10.306257301 }

2026/06/01 22:36:07.867242343 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",

2026/06/01 22:36:07.867291936 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/06/01 22:36:07.867313718 {

2026/06/01 22:36:07.867328670 new <- list()
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867329582 if (!missing(width))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867343082 new$width <- width
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867343863 if (!missing(height))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867352401 new$height <- height
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867364433 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867365194 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867379255 if (!missing(title))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867379906 new$title <- title
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867393356 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867394027 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867407386 if (!missing(version))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867408077 new$version <- version
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867422068 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867424912 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867436895 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867445462 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867446223 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867460344 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867461015 if (!missing(fg))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867474265 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867474966 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867488395 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867489958 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867504970 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867505841 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867520703 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867521414 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867536997 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867537668 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867562394 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867563065 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867577937 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867578618 if (!missing(compress))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867593440 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867594241 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867607526 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867609048 if (!missing(producer))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867632327 new$producer <- producer
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867633289 if (!missing(author))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867647910 new$author <- author
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867648651 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867666257 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867667839 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867685095 enc <- family$encoding
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867685856 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867702150 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867702851 "default"))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867718855 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867719526 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867731924 }
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867732595 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867746605 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867747336 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867762018 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867762699 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867778252 }
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867778933 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867792263 }
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867793004 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867805843 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867806544 if (is.null(pf))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867821235 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867821956 domain = NA)
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867837750 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867838451 }
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867851770 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867852551 old$family <- family
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867868555 }
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867869356 version <- old$version
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867881814 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867882535 "2.0")
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867896246 if (version %in% versions)
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867896987 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867913441 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867914292 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867929164 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867929905 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867946309 domain = NA)
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867947050 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867963194 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867963885 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867982973 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/06/01 22:36:07.867983694 old$fillOddEven, old$compress, old$timestamp, old$producer,
2026/06/01 22:36:07.868003303 old$author)
2026/06/01 22:36:07.868004004 invisible()
